prompt: Create a moody cinematic vertical portrait of one adult woman in a dark rain-soaked setting, framed from upper torso to head. She has dark brown wet hair hanging in loose strands around her shoulders, glossy wet skin with visible water droplets, bare shoulders, collarbones, and a dramatic black satin off-shoulder garment slipping down around her arms over a black top. Her face is completely covered by one centered opaque square censor block in flat medium brown, hiding all facial features while leaving the wet hair visible around it. Use warm low-key lighting from the front-left, strong highlights on skin and fabric, deep shadows, shallow depth of field, dark blurred background with faint rain streaks and soft bokeh. The mood is intimate, dramatic, editorial, and photorealistic, with high contrast, realistic skin texture, cinematic color grading, and a vertical 2:3 composition. Include exactly one person, exactly one censor square, and exactly one visible black off-shoulder satin garment; no text, no logos, no extra objects.
